title: Robobrawl Committee - 2023
subtitle: Completed April 2023
subheader: I did the audio visual work for iRobotics' Robobrawl 2023 event at Engineering Open House, designing digital and physical elements that created a strong visual identity.

content.label: This year's trailer that I made in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

content.caption: A "ready" button that would be used to signal to the hosts that each team was ready.

content.label: The second day of matches as an uncut livestream. The stream was hosted on both Twitch and YouTube, with the latter gaining 2000 different viewers.
